title: Vegan Brazilian Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy vegan stir fry made with vermicelli noodles and a variety of colorful vegetables.

ingredients.name: Fry
ingredients.notes: use a vegan alternative to fry

instructions: Cook the vermicelli noodles according to the package instructions.
Heat the sour Brazilian stir sauce in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onion and bell pepper to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Add the mushrooms to the skillet and cook until they're tender.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and stir to combine with the vegetables.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
